name: Wheels CLI Commands
author: Tom King, Peter Amiri
shortDescription: DEPRECATED & FROZEN — use the brew/scoop/apt/yum 'wheels' CLI instead
description: DEPRECATED & FROZEN. This legacy CommandBox module does not support Wheels 4.0+ and is no longer published (#3184). Install the supported CLI via brew/scoop/apt/yum and use 'wheels new'. See https://guides.wheels.dev/v4-0-0/command-line-tools/installation/
instructions: DEPRECATED & FROZEN. Do not install this module. The supported Wheels 4.0+ CLI ships via Homebrew/Scoop/apt/yum (e.g. 'brew install wheels-dev/wheels/wheels'), then run 'wheels new myapp'. See https://guides.wheels.dev/v4-0-0/command-line-tools/installation/
